description: This episode of Solana Bytes discusses the immutable owner extension on the Solana token 2022 program, explaining its importance in ensuring that ownership of a token account cannot be reassigned. The guide walks through creating a new token mint, establishing an account, and applying the immutable owner extension, demonstrating the process and expected outcomes when attempting to transfer ownership [t=0:24 - t=95:05].
topic_summary: Exploration of the immutable owner extension on Solana's token program, focusing on its functionality and implications for token account ownership [t=0:24 - t=95:05].
